gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/69)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/69)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) السَّخْلُ مَتَى تَجِبُ فِيهِ الصَّدَقَةُ قَالَ إِذَا أَجْذَعَ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Idrees, from Muhammad Bin Abdul Jabbar, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Is’haq Bin Ammar who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘The lamb, when would the charity (Zakāt) be Obligatory with regards to it?’ Heasws said: ‘When it is a year old’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ahmad ibn Idris has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Abd al-Jabbar from Safwan ibn Yahya from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about lamb when Zakat is obligatory for it. He (the Imam) said, ‘Zakat is obligatory when it becomes Jadha‘ (one year old).
